name: quality-metrics-runner
description: Run the quality-metrics Python CLI from VS Code.

qualityMetrics.pythonPath.description: Optional Python executable used for environment bootstrap. Leave empty to auto-detect (python3, then python; on Windows py -3).

qualityMetrics.scriptPath.description: Optional path to quality-metrics main.py, relative to workspace root or absolute. Leave empty to use bundled tool.

qualityMetrics.inputPath.description: Input path passed to --input, relative to workspace root or absolute.

qualityMetrics.outputPath.description: Optional output path passed to --output. Leave empty to create/use a 'Quality Report' folder inside the selected input folder.

qualityMetrics.testsPath.description: Optional tests path for --tests, relative to workspace root or absolute.

qualityMetrics.configPath.description: Optional config path for --config, relative to workspace root or absolute.

scripts.bundle:sync: rm -rf bundled/quality-metrics && mkdir -p bundled/quality-metrics && rsync -a --delete --exclude '__pycache__' --exclude '.git' ../main.py ../config ../core ../plugins ../tools ../requirements.txt bundled/quality-metrics/
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run bundle:sync && npm run compile
